meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve Slow Development
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development speed with this intermediate SaaS starter kit checklist. Leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to ship client projects faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, stop rebuilding boilerplate. Deploy a robust SaaS starter kit that integrates authentication, payment gateways, and database schemas out-of-the-box. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for automated implementation, you reduce your time-to-market by 70%, allowing you to focus on high-value client features.
content.intro:
You are staring at a blank IDE, the client deadline is breathing down your neck, and you are once again setting up Auth.js, Stripe webhooks, and database migrations for the tenth time this year. It is a soul-crushing cycle that kills your margins and stunts your ability to scale as a freelance developer. 

But the era of manual boilerplate assembly is over. By treating your development workflow as a product—using a hardened SaaS starter kit paired with AI-driven automation—you transform from a code-monkey into a high-velocity architect. This is how you reclaim your time, double your output, and deliver enterprise-grade software at breakneck speeds.

steps.title: Standardize Your Stack Architecture
steps.description: Establish a base repository that includes pre-configured database ORMs, environment variable management, and logging. This prevents 'configuration drift' across client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready Next.js 15 project with Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL integration, and a modular folder structure optimized for feature-based development.

steps.title: Automate Authentication Flows
steps.description: Never write a custom login hook again. Use a proven, secure identity provider integrated directly into your starter template to ensure compliance and security.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement Clerk authentication middleware and protected route patterns within the existing Next.js app structure.

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Payment logic is prone to bugs. Use your starter kit to inject a pre-tested Stripe checkout flow that handles webhooks and subscription states automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Stripe webhook listener and subscription management API route using current best practices for idempotency.

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Contracts
steps.description: Use tRPC or Server Actions to ensure frontend and backend stay in sync. This eliminates runtime errors during feature iteration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a tRPC router for user-profile management with full end-to-end type safety between the client and Drizzle schema.

steps.title: Deploy CI/CD Pipeline Automation
steps.description: Automate the transition from local development to production. A starter kit without deployment scripts is just a folder of files.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, type-checking, and preview deployments on every push.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Golden Repository' version of your starter kit; never edit the base template directly, always branch from it.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API routes immediately after scaffolding to ensure your starter kit remains stable.
Store your environment variables in a encrypted vault like Doppler; never commit .env files even in private starter kits.
Automate your database migrations using a CLI tool within your starter kit so you never have to manually run SQL files.
Keep your UI components in a separate library package (via Turborepo) to share them across multiple SaaS projects without duplication.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is operational, build a 'Project Skeleton' for your next client and use Claude Code to migrate your custom business logic into the standardized architecture.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start building the features that actually get you paid. By standardizing your workflow, you create a repeatable engine for success. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
